passives.desc: Turn Start: - Gain [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] based on [UnlockBuff_Base] stage on self - Apply [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] against a random Sinner, and prioritize attacking them - When using a Skill against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert all Coins on that Skill to [SuperCoin]s When attacking, if [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] is killed, or if this unit can no longer attack that target, use the remaining Skills against a random other Sinner - Prioritizes targets with the least current HP, unless they have 1 HP - When the randomly chosen Sinner is killed, or if the said Sinner's HP is brought down to 1, repeat this effect on another Sinner Deal +2.5% damage against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] for every [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (max 20%) - At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], deal +30% damage against all targets
passives.name: Will of the Prescript

passives.desc: Turn End: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, heal 10 SP and gain 3 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (once per turn) Turn End: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, gain 8 [KarmaOfIndexRien] - If this unit does not have [UnlockBuff_Base], gain 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] at Turn End - At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], does not gain [KarmaOfIndexRien]
passives.name: Undertake Prescript

passives.desc: Take -50% damage from Unopposed Attacks Take -50% damage from [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], [Burst], and [Sinking] When healing SP from [UnlockBuff_Base], if this unit's SP is below 15, heal SP up to 15 Encounter Start: Gain [BurningWoundRien_Mask] and heal SP up to 30 At 55%- HP, end the turn and gain a new pattern - Remove all effects other than those exclusive to this unit - At less than 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], change [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stack to 9
passives.name: Rien, The Index Nursefather

passives.desc: A random weapon is assigned to every Coin. Each weapon has a unique effect. - [RienWeapon01Hatchet] - [RienWeapon02Stiletto] - [RienWeapon03Greatsword] - [RienWeapon04Rapier] - [RienWeapon05Sledgehammer] - [RienWeapon06Ultragreatsword] - [RienWeapon07Lance] - [RienWeapon08Chain] - [RienWeapon09Scythe] When using an Attack Skill, gain 1 [StackRienSpecialSkill] (max 9) - Can be gained once per Skill; does not gain Stack from the same Skill twice Turn Start: At 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stacks, use a powerful Skill - Attack End: After using the powerful Skill for the first time, gain [Shin_Rien] - Reset the per-Skill [StackRienSpecialSkill] cap - Min & Max Speed +15 - Turn End: Gain 1 [Vulnerable] and 2 [ResultReduction] next turn Turn 3 Start: At less than 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], bring its Stack to 9; then, gain (Stack gained x 3) [KarmaOfIndexRien] - Then, activate this effect every 3 turns
passives.name: Oracle Device [Caduceus]

passives.desc:
Turn End: At 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] or at 95%-/85%-/75%- HP,
- Gain [UnlockBuff_Rien1]/[UnlockBuff_Rien2]/[UnlockBuff_Rien3]

Turn 1 End: At lower than [UnlockBuff_Base] stage 1, gain [UnlockBuff_Rien1]
Turn 2 End: At lower than [UnlockBuff_Base] stage 2, gain [UnlockBuff_Rien2]

When gaining [UnlockBuff_Base] for the first time, if this unit's SP is below 15, heal up to 15 SP

When [UnlockBuff_Base] is activated due to HP or Turn conditionals:
- At less than 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] Stack, raise the Stack to 3/6/9 and gain 5 [KarmaOfIndexRien] at the next Turn Start for every Stack gained
passives.name: Unlock

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

skills.desc: [WideAreaRampage] This Skill does not trigger the target's Defense Skills Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed [WhenUse] - Gain 3 [Breath] and +3 [Breath] Count - Clash Power +5 (Clash Power gained is reduced by 1 for every 5 [KarmaOfIndexRien] on self, down to 0) [WhenUse] At 0+ SP, generate 1 Mang - Deal +20% damage; Final Power +3 [WinDuel] - Gain 3 [Breath] and +3 [Breath] Count - Attack End: Inflict 3 [Laceration], 1 [Binding], and 1 [Vulnerable] next turn to all targets this unit hit [DefeatDuel] - Deal -80% final damage - Damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target; On Hit, does not activate [Sinking] on target [EndSkill] If this Skill generated Mang, lose 20 SP [EndSkill] End this turn
